headline: Ametek (AME) Q4 2024 Earnings Transcript
summary: Dave Zapico: Thank you, Kevin, and good morning, everyone.  AMETEK delivered strong results in the fourth quarter, highlighted by robust margin expansion, outstanding cashflow generation, strong organic orders growth and double-digit growth in earnings per share.  In the quarter, we established records for sales, operating income, EBITDA and diluted earnings per share as well as for operating cash flow and free cash flow.
